title: Offering Two Different Outputs That S Why
sourceTitle: Offering Two Different Outputs That S Why

imagePrompts.prompt: PYTHON_SCENE_GRAPH :: PARAMETRIC_CITY_RELIEF class Variables: city = "Kyoto" city_name_text = "literal city name from input" region_context = "infer country, terrain, climate, culture, urban identity" topography = "infer mountains, rivers, coastlines, plains, islands, deserts, hills" urban_grid = "infer district density, roads, transit corridors, urban pattern" landmarks = "infer landmark_set(city)" signature_core = "infer most symbolic central landmark or public space" style = "luxury 3D cartographic city model" class TerrainSlab: form = "thick raised cutout map base" surface = Variables.topography edges = "engraved title panel, legend, compass, scale, inset regional map" material = "matte stone/plaster/cartographic model material" class CityTypography: text = Variables. city_name_text form = "monumental 3D letters" function = "each letter is an inhabitable building mass" placement = "integrated into city map, not floating" rule = "word must remain readable from aerial view" class UrbanLayer: roads = Variables.urban_grid districts = "infer neighborhoods and density zones" landmarks = Variables.landmarks core = Variables.signature_core labels = "derive place labels from city geography" class Atmosphere: camera = "elevated three-quarter macro" lighting = "soft premium studio daylight" details = "vehicles, clouds, aircraft, trees, people only if appropriate" def render(): return """ Render Kyoto as a raised terrain-map diorama where the city name becomes monumental architecture, surrounded by inferred geography, landmarks, labels, roads, and atlas-style cartographic details. """
imagePrompts.title: Offering Two Different Outputs That S Why

imagePrompts.prompt: PYTHON_SCENE_GRAPH :: PARAMETRIC_CITY_RELIEF class Variables: city = "Kyoto" city_name_text = "literal city name from input" region_context = "infer country, terrain, climate, culture, urban identity" topography = "infer mountains, rivers, coastlines, plains, islands, deserts, hills" urban_grid = "infer district density, roads, transit corridors, urban pattern" landmarks = "infer landmark_set(city)" signature_core = "infer most symbolic central landmark or public space" style = "luxury 3D cartographic city model" class TerrainSlab: form = "thick raised cutout map base" surface = Variables.topography edges = "engraved title panel, legend, compass, scale, inset regional map" material = "matte stone/plaster/cartographic model material" class CityTypography: text = Variables. city_name_text form = "monumental 3D letters" function = "each letter is an inhabitable building mass" placement = "integrated into city map, not floating" rule = "word must remain readable from aerial view" class UrbanLayer: roads = Variables.urban_grid districts = "infer neighborhoods and density zones" landmarks = Variables.landmarks core = Variables.signature_core labels = "derive place labels from city geography" class Atmosphere: camera = "elevated three-quarter macro" lighting = "soft premium studio daylight" details = "vehicles, clouds, aircraft, trees, people only if appropriate" def render(): return """ Render Kyoto as a raised terrain-map diorama where the city name becomes monumental architecture, surrounded by inferred geography, landmarks, labels, roads, and atlas-style cartographic details. """

prompt: PYTHON_SCENE_GRAPH :: PARAMETRIC_CITY_RELIEF class Variables: city = "Kyoto" city_name_text = "literal city name from input" region_context = "infer country, terrain, climate, culture, urban identity" topography = "infer mountains, rivers, coastlines, plains, islands, deserts, hills" urban_grid = "infer district density, roads, transit corridors, urban pattern" landmarks = "infer landmark_set(city)" signature_core = "infer most symbolic central landmark or public space" style = "luxury 3D cartographic city model" class TerrainSlab: form = "thick raised cutout map base" surface = Variables.topography edges = "engraved title panel, legend, compass, scale, inset regional map" material = "matte stone/plaster/cartographic model material" class CityTypography: text = Variables. city_name_text form = "monumental 3D letters" function = "each letter is an inhabitable building mass" placement = "integrated into city map, not floating" rule = "word must remain readable from aerial view" class UrbanLayer: roads = Variables.urban_grid districts = "infer neighborhoods and density zones" landmarks = Variables.landmarks core = Variables.signature_core labels = "derive place labels from city geography" class Atmosphere: camera = "elevated three-quarter macro" lighting = "soft premium studio daylight" details = "vehicles, clouds, aircraft, trees, people only if appropriate" def render(): return """ Render Kyoto as a raised terrain-map diorama where the city name becomes monumental architecture, surrounded by inferred geography, landmarks, labels, roads, and atlas-style cartographic details. """
originalPrompt: PYTHON_SCENE_GRAPH :: PARAMETRIC_CITY_RELIEF class Variables: city = "Kyoto" city_name_text = "literal city name from input" region_context = "infer country, terrain, climate, culture, urban identity" topography = "infer mountains, rivers, coastlines, plains, islands, deserts, hills" urban_grid = "infer district density, roads, transit corridors, urban pattern" landmarks = "infer landmark_set(city)" signature_core = "infer most symbolic central landmark or public space" style = "luxury 3D cartographic city model" class TerrainSlab: form = "thick raised cutout map base" surface = Variables.topography edges = "engraved title panel, legend, compass, scale, inset regional map" material = "matte stone/plaster/cartographic model material" class CityTypography: text = Variables. city_name_text form = "monumental 3D letters" function = "each letter is an inhabitable building mass" placement = "integrated into city map, not floating" rule = "word must remain readable from aerial view" class UrbanLayer: roads = Variables.urban_grid districts = "infer neighborhoods and density zones" landmarks = Variables.landmarks core = Variables.signature_core labels = "derive place labels from city geography" class Atmosphere: camera = "elevated three-quarter macro" lighting = "soft premium studio daylight" details = "vehicles, clouds, aircraft, trees, people only if appropriate" def render(): return """ Render Kyoto as a raised terrain-map diorama where the city name becomes monumental architecture, surrounded by inferred geography, landmarks, labels, roads, and atlas-style cartographic details. """

promptTranslations.zh:
提供两种不同的输出。这就是为什么我使用这些依赖于推理的复杂提示。 Nano Banana 的情况可能也是如此。

PYTHON_SCENE_GRAPH :: PARAMETRIC_CITY_RELIEF 类变量： city = "Kyoto" city_name_text = "输入的字面城市名称" Region_context = "推断国家、地形、气候、文化、城市特征" 地形 = "推断山脉、河流、海岸线、平原、岛屿、沙漠、丘陵" Urban_grid = "推断地区密度、道路、交通走廊、城市格局" 地标 = “推断地标集（城市）”signature_core =“推断最具象征意义的中心地标或公共空间”样式=“豪华3D制图城市模型”类TerrainSlab：形式=“厚凸起的剪裁地图底座”表面=变量。地形边缘=“雕刻标题面板，图例，指南针，比例尺，插入区域地图”材料=“哑光石头/石膏/制图模型材料”类CityTypography：文本=变量。 city_name_text form =“纪念性3D字母”function =“每个字母都是一个适合居住的建筑体”placement =“集成到城市地图中，而不是浮动”rule =“单词必须从鸟瞰图上保持可读”class UrbanLayer：roads = Variables.urban_grid Districts =“推断社区和密度区”landmarks = Variables.landmarks core = Variables.signature_core labels =“从城市地理中导出地点标签”class Atmosphere：camera = “高架四分之三宏观”照明=“柔和的高级工作室日光”细节=“车辆，云，飞机，树木，仅在适当时的人”def render（）：返回“”“将[城市]渲染为凸起的地形地图西洋镜，其中城市名称成为纪念性建筑，周围环绕着推断的地理，地标，标签，道路和地图集风格的制图细节。”“
promptTranslations.fr:
offrant deux sorties différentes. C'est pourquoi j'utilise ces invites complexes qui reposent sur l'inférence. Ce serait probablement le cas sur Nano Banana.

PYTHON_SCENE_GRAPH :: PARAMETRIC_CITY_RELIEF variables de classe : city = "Kyoto" city_name_text = "nom littéral de la ville à partir de l'entrée" region_context = "déduire le pays, le terrain, le climat, la culture, l'identité urbaine" topography = "déduire les montagnes, les rivières, les littoraux, les plaines, les îles, les déserts, les collines" urban_grid = "déduire la densité des districts, les routes, les couloirs de transit, le modèle urbain"s = "déduire monument_ensemble (ville)" signature_core = "déduire le point de repère central ou l'espace public le plus symbolique" style = "modèle de ville cartographique 3D de luxe" classe TerrainSlab: form = "base de carte épaisse et découpée en relief" surface = Variables.topography bords = "panneau de titre gravé, légende, boussole, échelle, carte régionale en médaillon" matériel = "pierre mate/plâtre/matériau de modèle cartographique" classe CityTypography: texte = Variables. city_name_text form = "lettres monumentales en 3D" function = "chaque lettre est un bâtiment habitable" placement = "intégré au plan de la ville, non flottant" règle = "le mot doit rester lisible depuis la vue aérienne" classe UrbanLayer: routes = Variables.urban_grid districts = "déduire les quartiers et les zones de densité" monuments = Variables.landmarks core = Variables.signature_core labels = "dériver les étiquettes de lieu de la géographie de la ville" classe Atmosphère: caméra = "macro aux trois quarts surélevés" éclairage = "lumière du jour soft premium studio" détails = "véhicules, nuages, avions, arbres, personnes uniquement si approprié" def render(): return """ Rendre Kyoto sous la forme d'un diorama de carte de terrain surélevé où le nom de la ville devient une architecture monumentale, entouré de géographie déduite, de points de repère, d'étiquettes, de routes et de détails cartographiques de style atlas.
promptTranslations.ru:
предлагая два разных выхода. Вот почему я использую эти сложные подсказки, основанные на умозаключениях. То же самое, вероятно, будет и в случае с Nano Banana.

PYTHON_SCENE_GRAPH :: Переменные класса PARAMETRIC_CITY_RELIEF: city = "Kyoto" city_name_text = "буквальное название города из введенных данных" Region_context = "определить страну, местность, климат, культуру, городскую идентичность" topography = "определить горы, реки, береговые линии, равнины, острова, пустыни, холмы" Urban_grid = "определить плотность района, дороги, транзитные коридоры, город шаблон" ориентиры = "вывести ориентир_набор(город)" подпись_кор = "выбрать наиболее символический центральный ориентир или общественное место" стиль = "роскошная 3D картографическая модель города" класс TerrainSlab: form = "толстая рельефная основа карты" поверхность = Variables.topography Edges = "гравированная титульная панель, легенда, компас, масштаб, вставка региональной карты" материал = "матовый камень/штукатурка/материал картографической модели" класс CityTypography: text = Переменные. city_name_text form = «монументальные 3D-буквы» function = «каждая буква представляет собой жилую массу зданий» location = «интегрирована в карту города, а не плавающая» rule = «слово должно оставаться читаемым с высоты птичьего полета» класс UrbanLayer: дороги = Variables.urban_grid Districts = «определить районы и зоны плотности» ориентиры = Variables.landmarks core = Variables.signature_core labels = «получить метки мест из города geography" class Атмосфера: camera = "приподнятый трехчетвертный макрос" освещение = "мягкий студийный дневной свет премиум-класса" Details = "транспортные средства, облака, самолеты, деревья, люди только в случае необходимости" def render(): return """ Рендеринг Kyoto как приподнятой диорамы с картой местности, где название города становится монументальной архитектурой, окруженной предполагаемыми географическими объектами, ориентирами, надписями, дорогами и картографическими деталями в стиле атласа.
promptTranslations.pt:
oferecendo duas saídas diferentes. É por isso que uso esses prompts complexos que dependem de inferência. Provavelmente o mesmo aconteceria com Nano Banana.

PYTHON_SCENE_GRAPH :: PARAMETRIC_CITY_RELIEF class Variáveis: city = "Kyoto" city_name_text = "nome literal da cidade a partir da entrada" region_context = "inferir país, terreno, clima, cultura, identidade urbana" topography = "inferir montanhas, rios, litorais, planícies, ilhas, desertos, colinas" urban_grid = "inferir densidade distrital, estradas, corredores de trânsito, padrão urbano" marcos = "inferir marco_set (cidade)" assinatura_core = "inferir o marco central mais simbólico ou espaço público" style = "modelo cartográfico de cidade 3D de luxo" class TerrainSlab: form = "base de mapa com recorte elevado espesso" surface = Variables.topography bordas = "painel de título gravado, legenda, bússola, escala, mapa regional inserido" material = "pedra fosca/gesso/material de modelo cartográfico" class CityTypography: text = Variables. city_name_text form = "letras 3D monumentais" function = "cada letra é uma massa de construção habitável" posicionamento = "integrado ao mapa da cidade, não flutuante" regra = "a palavra deve permanecer legível a partir da vista aérea" class UrbanLayer: estradas = Variáveis.urban_grid distritos = "inferir bairros e zonas de densidade" marcos = Variáveis.landmarks core = Variáveis.signature_core rótulos = "derivar rótulos de locais da geografia da cidade" class Atmosfera: câmera = "macro três quartos elevada" iluminação = "luz diurna suave de estúdio premium" detalhes = "veículos, nuvens, aeronaves, árvores, pessoas apenas se apropriado" def render(): return """ Renderize Kyoto como um diorama de mapa de terreno elevado onde o nome da cidade se torna arquitetura monumental, cercado por geografia inferida, pontos de referência, rótulos, estradas e detalhes cartográficos em estilo atlas.
promptTranslations.ja:
2 つの異なる出力を提供します。そのため、私は推論に依存するこれらの複雑なプロンプトを使用しています。おそらくNano Bananaでも同様でしょう。

PYTHON_SCENE_GRAPH :: PARAMETRIC_CITY_RELIEF クラス変数: city = "Kyoto" city_name_text = "入力からのリテラル都市名"region_context = "国、地形、気候、文化、都市アイデンティティを推測" topoography = "山、川、海岸線、平原、島々、砂漠、丘を推測" Urban_grid = "地区の密度、道路、交通機関を推測回廊、都市パターン」 ランドマーク = 「ランドマークセット(都市) を推測」 シグネチャーコア = 「最も象徴的な中心ランドマークまたは公共スペースを推測」 スタイル = 「高級 3D 地図作成都市モデル」 クラス TerrainSlab: フォーム = 「厚く隆起したカットアウト マップ ベース」 表面 = Variables.topography エッジ = 「彫刻されたタイトル パネル、凡例、コンパス、縮尺、挿入地域地図」 マテリアル = 「艶消し石/石膏/地図作成モデルのマテリアル」 クラスCityTypography: テキスト = 変数。 city_name_text form = "記念碑的な 3D 文字" function = "各文字は居住可能な建物の集合体です" place = "浮遊ではなく、都市地図に統合されています" rules = "単語は航空写真から読み取れる状態でなければなりません" class UrbanLayer: 道路 = Variables.urban_grid Districts = "近隣地域と密度ゾーンを推測する" ランドマーク = Variables.landmarks core = Variables.signature_core label = "都市から場所ラベルを取得するgeography" クラス 雰囲気: カメラ = "高架 3/4 マクロ" 照明 = "ソフト プレミアム スタジオ デイライト" 詳細 = "車両、雲、航空機、樹木、該当する場合のみ人物" def render(): return """ Kyoto を、推定された地理、ランドマーク、ラベル、道路、地図帳スタイルの地図詳細に囲まれた記念碑的な建築物となる隆起地形図ジオラマとしてレンダリングします。
promptTranslations.ko:
두 가지 다른 출력을 제공합니다. 이것이 제가 추론에 의존하는 복잡한 프롬프트를 사용하는 이유입니다. 아마도 Nano Banana의 경우도 마찬가지일 것입니다.

PYTHON_SCENE_GRAPH :: PARAMETRIC_CITY_RELIEF 클래스 변수: city = "Kyoto" city_name_text = "입력에서 문자 그대로의 도시 이름" Region_context = "국가, 지형, 기후, 문화, 도시 정체성 추론" 지형 = "산, 강, 해안선, 평원, 섬, 사막, 언덕 추론" urban_grid = "지구 밀도, 도로, 대중교통 통로, 도시 패턴 추론" Landmarks = "landmark_set(city) 추론" sign_core = "가장 상징적인 중앙 랜드마크 또는 공공 장소 추론" style = "럭셔리한 3D 지도 제작 도시 모델" class TerrainSlab: form = "두꺼운 돌출 컷아웃 지도 베이스" 표면 = Variables.topography edge = "각인된 제목 패널, 범례, 나침반, 축척, 삽입된 지역 지도" Material = "무광택 돌/석고/지도 제작 모델 재료" 클래스 CityTypography: text = 변수. city_name_text form = "기념비적인 3D 문자" function = "각 문자는 사람이 거주할 수 있는 건물 덩어리입니다." 배치 = "떠다니지 않고 도시 지도에 통합됨" 규칙 = "단어는 공중 보기에서 읽을 수 있어야 합니다." class UrbanLayer: roads = Variables.urban_grid Districts = "인근 지역 및 밀도 구역 추론" 랜드마크 = Variables.landmarks core = Variables.signature_core labels = "도시 지리에서 장소 레이블 파생" class Atmosphere: 카메라 = "높은 3/4 매크로" 조명 = "부드러운 프리미엄 스튜디오 일광" 세부 정보 = "차량, 구름, 항공기, 나무, 적절한 경우 사람만" def render(): return """ Kyoto를 추론된 지리, 랜드마크, 라벨, 도로 및 아틀라스 스타일의 지도 세부 정보로 둘러싸인 도시 이름이 기념비적 건축물이 되는 높은 지형 지도 디오라마로 렌더링합니다.
